title: Bluebird Tweaks
description: A collection of client side mods to improve the experience for me
body:

# Info
This modpack is mainly for me and includes many of my resourcepacks embedded in the pack itself. You can use this all you want but don't report bugs to me expecting them to get fixed (Most likely a mod problem anyways that I can't fix).
